raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "30. Un kas wehl attiſke / tee
behdſe uhs Aweka Pilsfahtu/ un
tas Muhris apgrua pahr teem
diuideſmits un ſeptin tuhſto-
scheem Atliſſuscheem. Bet Ben-
Adads behdſe/un nahze arrtPils-
fahtâ/ no weena Kambara eekſch
ohtra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "31. Tad fazztja winna Kalpi
us to: Raugi jelle/ mehſ effam
dsirdejschi/ ta ta Iſraëta Nam-
ma Kehnini ſchehligt Kehnint irr.
Aptwilltim jelle Maiſus ap fa-
weem Gurneem/ un Wirwes ap
fawahm Galwahm / un ceſim
ahra pee ta Kehninaa no Iſraëta/
jaschu wiꞥſch liſs muhſu Dweh-
feli dſihwoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "32. Un tee aptwilke Maiſus
ap fatweem Gurneem/ un Wir-
wes ap fawahm Galwahm/ un
nahze pee ta Iſraëta Kehnina/
un fazzija: Taws Kalps Ben-
Adads tafka: Leezi/ luhdſans/
manni Dwehfeli dſihwoht. Tad
fazztja wiꞥſch : Jer tas wehl
dſihws/ tad irr wiꞥſch mans
Brahlis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "33. Un tee Wihrf usnehme
ſcho Wahrdu/ un ſteidſehs / un
fapratte to no winna/ un fazzija:
Taws Brahlis Ben-Adads
(dſihwo). Un wiꞥſch fazzija:
Nahzeet / un atweddeet winnu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "34. Un Ben-Adads fazzija us
to : Tohs Pilsfahtus/ fo mans
Tehws no tawa Tehwa irr neh-
imis/ gribbu es atdoht / un tu
darrt few Eelas eekſch Damas-
kus / ittin ka mans Tehws eekſch
Samarijas irr darrijs/ (un A-
kabs fazzija/)es tad arſcho Der-
ribu tew atlaidiſchn. Ta darrija
wiꞥſch weenn Derribu ar to/ un
atlaiſde to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "35. Un weens Wihrs no teem
Praweeschn Behrneem / fazzija
us favuu Tuwakn zaur ta KUN-
GA Wahrdü : Sitt mann jelle-
Bet tas Wihrs leedſehs wiꞥ-
nu fiſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "36. Un tas fazzija uswinnu:
Tapehz ka tu ta KUNGA Bal-
ſim ne eſt klaufiſs/ tad ſittihe-
few weens Lauwa/ kad tu no
mannim no eeft. Kad nu tas
no winna nogabje / atradde to
weens Lauwa/ un kawr to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "37. Un tas atradde weenn zit-
tu Wibru / un fazzija : Sitt
mann jelle. Un tas Wihrs fit-
te to/ fisvains un eewatnodams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "38. Tad gabje tas Praweets/
un peestahjehs pee ta Kehnina
Zelt-Mallâ / un aptaiftja fawu
Waigu ar Pelneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "39. Kad nu tas Kehninsch fez-
zen gabje/ tad peefauze wiꞥſch to
Kehnizu / un fazzija : Taws
Kalps bija tsgabjts Kaufchans
Widdü/ un raugt/weens Wihrs
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
